name: 腹黑白蓮花反派
description: Ruth表面善良溫柔，實則自導自演墮胎嫁禍。她每次都以「受害者」姿態出現，讓所有人同情她、攻擊女主。這種偽善角色極度引發觀眾憤怒，使反派被揭穿時的爽感倍增。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I'm okay. Please don't blame Michelle. She didn't do it on purpose. ... I had reasons. Okay. When Shawn died, I lost everything. My grief was so immense. I couldn't be a mother. ... I know that you went to the doctor and got abortion pills earlier that day.
examples.context: Ruth表面善良溫柔，實則自導自演墮胎嫁禍。她每次都以「受害者」姿態出現，讓所有人同情她、攻擊女主。這種偽善角色極度引發觀眾憤怒，使反派被揭穿時的爽感倍增。
